title: Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: Grilled skewers of marinated chicken, smoked paprika, and fiery spices, inspired by Brazilian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Brazilian-style skewers
ingredients.notes: wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, fiery chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the prepared skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Cook to an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
